backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the chat app's backend: user registration, conversation management (1-on-1 and group), message sending/status, and media storage, with access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the post-registration navigation fix (immediate transition to chat list after createUser) is implemented in App.tsx and RegistrationScreen.tsx with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and notable implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point with the page title set to 'Xeta' and a root div that loads the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication, profile loading with timeout/retry, post-registration immediate navigation via a local registeredProfile state, and screen/tab routing for the full app.
frontend/src/components/BluetoothPairing: Empty file — the BluetoothPairing component has no content.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: Bottom tab bar component rendering Chats, Updates, Calls, and Settings tabs with active state styling using xeta-green color tokens.
frontend/src/components/CallsScreen.tsx: Placeholder screen for the Calls tab displaying a header and a 'coming soon' message with a phone icon.
frontend/src/components/ChatInterface.ts: Empty file — the ChatInterface component has no content.
frontend/src/components/ChatListScreen.t: Chat list screen showing sorted conversations with search that queries all users to start new 1-on-1 chats, plus FAB actions for new chat, new group, profile, and Xeta AI.
frontend/src/components/ChatScreen.tsx: Main chat screen component that displays messages for a conversation, handles sending text and file/image messages, and marks received messages as delivered.
frontend/src/components/ConnectionStatus: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/ContactsList.tsx: Contacts list screen that allows users to search for other users by username and initiate a new chat conversation.
frontend/src/components/CreateGroupScree: Two-step screen for creating a group chat by searching and selecting participants, then providing a group name.
frontend/src/components/MessageBubble.ts: Renders a single chat message bubble supporting text, image, and file message types, with timestamp and delivery receipt icon.
frontend/src/components/PresenceIndicato: Displays a user's online/offline presence status with an optional colored dot and formatted status text.
frontend/src/components/ProfileScreen.ts: Profile editing screen where users can update their display name and status message, view their avatar, and log out.
frontend/src/components/ReceiptIcon.tsx: Renders an SVG message receipt icon reflecting sent, delivered, or read status using single or double checkmarks.
frontend/src/components/RegistrationScre: Renders a registration form where new users enter a username and display name, validates input, calls the createUser mutation, and invokes onRegistered with the resulting profile on success.
frontend/src/components/UpdatesScreen.ts: Displays a placeholder 'Updates' screen with a header and a centered message indicating that Status and Stories features are coming soon.
frontend/src/components/UserAvatar.tsx: Renders a user avatar as either an image (if avatarUrl is provided) or a colored circle with initials, supporting sm/md/lg/xl size variants.
frontend/src/components/XetaAIChatScreen: Implements a mock AI chat screen with keyword-based response matching and a fallback pool of generic responses, simulating a conversational assistant within the Xeta app.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, exposing login/logout functions and identity/status state to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, conversation listing, message sending/fetching, and contact management, each wired to the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter/Nunito fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a dark green/charcoal Xeta theme using OKLCH CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes, plus custom utility classes and scrollbar styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/types/web-bluetooth.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file intended for Web Bluetooth API type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Utility functions for formatting timestamps (relative time, message time, chat list time), checking online presence status, and extracting initials from names.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the theme with Inter/Nunito fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (including Xeta-branded colors), custom border radii, box shadows, and registers typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file describing the Xeta messaging app's current version, feature list, architectural notes, and known issues (sign-in loading failures and registration navigation bugs).
